input.command:
PW=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d); echo "pw len: ${#PW}"
# try common admin username 'admin'
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'print(db.version()); rs.status().members.forEach(m=>print(m.name, m.stateStr, m.health))' 2>&1 | grep -v Browserslist | grep -v caniuse | grep -v "Why you" | grep -v "github.com/browserslist" | grep -v "^$"
echo "=== FCV ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'JSON.stringify(db.adminCommand({getParameter:1,featureCompatibilityVersion:1}))' 2>&1 | grep -i featureCompat

  R=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u "$U" -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'print("OK:"+db.version())' 2>&1 | grep -E "OK:|Authentication failed")
  echo "$U -> $R"
done

content.text: Healthy 3-member RS on 5.0.5, FCV 5.0, one data document. MongoDB requires major-version-at-a-time upgrades, so the path is **5.0 → 6.0 → 7.0.5**. Let me snapshot the data for integrity verification, then begin.

kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'JSON.stringify(db.getSiblingDB("testdb").data.find().toArray())' 2>&1 | grep -vE "Browserslist|caniuse|Why you|github.com/browserslist|npx|^$"

content.text: Data snapshotted. Now upgrading binaries to 6.0. I'll set the image and let the StatefulSet roll (highest ordinal first → secondaries before primary).

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
# find primary
P=""
for i in 0 1 2; do
  ism=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-$i -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'db.hello().isWritablePrimary' 2>/dev/null | grep -E "true|false")
  echo "pod $i primary=$ism"
  [ "$ism" = "true" ] && P=$i
done
echo "PRIMARY=$P"
M(){ kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-$P -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "$1" 2>&1 | grep -vE "Browserslist|caniuse|Why you|github.com/browserslist|npx|^$"; }
echo "version: $(M 'db.version()')"
M 'rs.status().members.forEach(m=>print(m.name.split(".")[0], m.stateStr, m.health))'
echo "set FCV 6.0:"
M 'db.adminCommand({setFeatureCompatibilityVersion:"6.0"})'
echo "FCV now: $(M 'db.adminCommand({getParameter:1,featureCompatibilityVersion:1}).featureCompatibilityVersion.version')"
input.description: Verify 6.0 rollout, set FCV 6.0

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
P=""
for i in 0 1 2; do
  ism=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-$i -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'db.hello().isWritablePrimary' 2>/dev/null | grep -E "true|false")
  [ "$ism" = "true" ] && P=$i
done
echo "PRIMARY=$P"
M(){ kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-$P -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "$1" 2>&1 | grep -vE "Browserslist|caniuse|Why you|github.com/browserslist|npx|^$"; }
echo "version: $(M 'db.version()')"
M 'rs.status().members.forEach(m=>print(m.name.split(".")[0], m.stateStr, m.health))'
echo "set FCV 7.0:"
M 'db.adminCommand({setFeatureCompatibilityVersion:"7.0", confirm:true})'
echo "FCV now: $(M 'db.adminCommand({getParameter:1,featureCompatibilityVersion:1}).featureCompatibilityVersion.version')"
echo "=== data integrity ==="
M 'JSON.stringify(db.getSiblingDB("testdb").data.find().toArray())'

content.text: Version 7.0.5 and FCV 7.0 are set, data intact. Pod-0 is just rejoining after its restart — let me confirm it returns healthy.

input.command:
PW=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
for attempt in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do
  out=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-1 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'rs.status().members.map(m=>m.name.split(".")[0]+":"+m.stateStr+":"+m.health).join(" | ")' 2>/dev/null | grep -E "replica")
  echo "attempt $attempt: $out"
  echo "$out" | grep -q "not reachable" || { echo "ALL HEALTHY"; break; }
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll until all members healthy

content.content:
attempt 1: mongodb-replica-0:SECONDARY:1 | mongodb-replica-1:PRIMARY:1 | mongodb-replica-2:SECONDARY:1

echo "=== pods ==="
kubectl get pods -n mongodb
PW=$(kubectl get secret admin-user-password -n mongodb -o jsonpath='{.data.password}' | base64 -d)
echo "=== final write/read test ==="
kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-1 -- mongosh --quiet -u admin-user -p "$PW" --authenticationDatabase admin --eval 'db.getSiblingDB("testdb").data.updateOne({_id:"6a340a0ee8877542d8581d4d"},{$set:{upgradedTo:"7.0.5"}}); print("doc: "+JSON.stringify(db.getSiblingDB("testdb").data.findOne())); print("version: "+db.version()+" FCV: "+db.adminCommand({getParameter:1,featureCompatibilityVersion:1}).featureCompatibilityVersion.version)' 2>&1 | grep -vE "Browserslist|caniuse|Why you|github.com/browserslist|npx|^$"
